title: Global stocks have recouped Iran war losses to hit fresh records — but the shadow of Mideast conflict still looms
summary_full: Global stocks have clawed back losses triggered by the Iran conflict, with major indexes now trading at or above pre-war levels.
summary_public: Global stocks have clawed back losses triggered by the Iran conflict, with major indexes now trading at or above pre-war levels.

IR.label: negative
